calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Dan Cardona, Inc., dba CD Construction.
Default was entered against defendant on September 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 4, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dan Cardona, Inc., dba CD Construction, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,471.96.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,579.72.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $419.46, for a total judgment in the amount of $43,971.14.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Off Calendar
